case_title: ALLIED TEMPORARIES INC VS COOK WALTER, ESQ, L O OFFICES OF JOSEPH O'SULLIVAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,950.00 FILED BY ALLIED TEMPORARIES INC AS TO DEFENDANT COOK WALTER, ESQ, L O OFFICES OF JOSEPH O'SULLIVAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COOK WALTER, ESQ, L O OFFICES OF JOSEPH O'SULLIVAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLIED TEMPORARIES INC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COOK WALTER, ESQ, L O OFFICES OF JOSEPH O'SULLIVAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR RCONSIDERATION BY PLAINTIFF IS DENIED BY JUDGE DESMOND. HRG DATE OF 10/15/92 AT 9:00 AM.
